headline: Why Are HP (HPQ) Shares Soaring Today
summary: Shares of personal computing and printing company HP (NYSE:HPQ) jumped 15.6% in the afternoon session after investor optimism grew around the demand for its new AI-powered PCs as traders positioned themselves ahead of its upcoming fiscal Q2 2026 earnings report.
